steps.explanation: Whales travel between 72 and 77 miles per day, so the daily range is \(72 \le d \le 77\).
Over 16 days, total miles \(x = 16d\). Multiply all parts of the inequality by 16 (positive, so signs unchanged): \(72 \times 16 \le x \le 77 \times 16\).

• A: Adds 16 instead of multiplying — wrong operation.
  • B: \((72)(16) \le x \le (77)(16)\) — matches our result. That matches choice B — B is correct.
  • C: \(72 \le 16 + x \le 77\) — subtracts 16 from \(x\), which doesn't represent total distance.
  • D: \(72 \le 16x \le 77\) — divides by 16 instead of multiplying, giving a tiny range.
